bug_report.summary: Rendered H1 heading marker/icon near “Helpful Links” shifts/mis-renders (minor layout difference)
steps_to_reproduce: Open the application and open a note that contains an H1 heading (e.g., the “Helpful Links” document) in the rendered/preview pane.
Observe the H1 heading area (left-side heading marker/decoration near the “Helpful Links” title).
expected_behaviors: The H1 heading marker/decoration (e.g., the green “#” indicator) should render consistently in position and shape between builds.
actual_behaviors: The H1 heading marker/decoration near “Helpful Links” appears slightly different (position/shape) after the change (small but detectable shift/mis-render in the heading marker region).

bug_report.summary: File chooser left sidebar highlights the wrong location (shows Downloads selected while Documents is the current folder)
steps_to_reproduce: Go to File → Open workspace… to open the system file chooser.
Observe the left sidebar selection highlight and the path bar/current folder.
expected_behaviors: When navigating to “Documents”, the left sidebar should highlight/select “Documents”, matching the path bar/current folder contents.
actual_behaviors: After the change, the dialog shows path “myuser > Documents” and Documents contents, but the left sidebar highlight is on “Downloads”, indicating the selection highlight is out of sync with the active folder.
